name: Aubergine bath bomb
description: The famously cheeky aubergine — shaped bath bomb that smells exactly like walking into a Lush shop — the scent is '29 High Street', crafted to capture that iconic store — floor fragrance. Contains fresh aubergine for its skin — loving vitamins and minerals.
archive_note: Released as part of the February 2026 Lush Kitchen XL Valentine's subscription box
nostalgia_angle: Floral body lotions are a beloved Lush staple, and a Valentine's seasonal release always carries a sense of occasion for subscribers
